---
title: "Step 5 - Personal Folder Under FSx"
---

Your personal folder on the STRADA FSx file system is used for storing work outputs. Complete **after** your Redshift account is created (Step 3).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Lilly FTE

1.  [ServiceNow](https://lilly.service-now.com) → search **"BUIT GSS IT Access Request"**.

2.  Fill the form with by inputing the following text in the select fields:*Access Request* | Application: *RWE STRADA Data Platform* | Request Type: *Other* | Description: *Personal Folder creation* | User Type: *Business user* | Description field: *"Please get the personal folder created with the name YOUR FULL NAME inside the rwe_all_personal_folder on FSx"*

::: {.callout-note}
### Folder Naming Convention
Use the format **Firstname_Lastname** (e.g., `Lili_Huang`). This is the standard naming convention for personal folders under `rwe_all_personal_folder`.
:::

3.  Order Now → Check Out.

Folder path: `\\veo_fsx_prod.aws.lilly.com\veo_fsx\strada\rwe_all_personal_folder\[Firstname_Lastname]`

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Vendor / Contractor

1.  [ServiceNow](https://lilly.service-now.com) → search **"BUIT GSS IT Access Request"**.

2.  Fill the form identically: What to do: *Access Request* | Application: *RWE STRADA Data Platform* | Request Type: *Other* | Description: *Personal Folder creation* | User Type: *Business user* | Description: *"Please get the personal folder created with the name YOUR FULL NAME inside the rwe_all_personal_folder on FSx"*

Use the **Firstname_Lastname** format (e.g., `Lili_Huang`) for your folder name.

3.  Order Now → Check Out.

Folder path: `\\veo_fsx_prod.aws.lilly.com\veo_fsx\strada\rwe_all_personal_folder\[Firstname_Lastname]`

---

*Content or technical issues with this site? [Click here](maintenance.qmd) to report any issues or provide feedback.*
